items.name: Internet of Things (IoT)
items.text: We build and integrate smart IoT solutions that connect physical devices to digital systems, enabling automation, monitoring, and real-time data collection for homes and businesses.

items.name: Mobile App Development
items.text: We develop high-performance mobile applications for Android and iOS, crafting intuitive interfaces and robust back-end integrations tailored to your unique business needs.

items.name: Website Design & WordPress
items.text: From custom-designed websites to fully functional WordPress platforms, we deliver responsive, SEO-friendly, and visually compelling web experiences for all types of businesses.

items.name: Personal Portfolio Creation
items.text: We design and develop professional personal portfolio websites that showcase your skills, projects, and achievements — helping you stand out in a competitive digital world.

items.name: Digital Forensics (FTK)
items.text: We provide professional digital forensics support using industry-standard tools like FTK (Forensic Tool Kit), assisting organizations in evidence collection, analysis, and incident investigations.

items.name: Artificial Intelligence
items.text: We leverage AI to build intelligent systems and data-driven solutions — from machine learning models to computer vision and automation pipelines for modern enterprises.
